# 📅 SACCO Implementation Schedule
## January 2026 – December 2031

> 💡 **Insight:** The project spans 5 years, divided into 20 quarterly periods, with activities phased to build a strong foundation before scaling services and impact.

---

## 📆 Activity Timeline

| **Activity** | **Year 1** | **Year 2** | **Year 3** | **Year 4** | **Year 5** |
|---|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| SACCO Legal Formation & Regulatory Compliance | Q1–Q3 | | | | |
| Digital SACCO Platform Development | Q3–Q4 | Q5–Q6 | | | |
| Member Recruitment and Onboarding Campaign | | Q5–Q8 | Q9–Q12 | Q13–Q16 | Q17–Q20 |
| Innovative Financial Products Design | | Q5–Q11 | | | |
| Partnership Development and Fundraising | | Q5–Q12 | Q9–Q12 | Q13–Q16 | Q17–Q20 |
| Innovation and Startup Mentorship Programs | | | Q9–Q14 | | |
| Networking and Innovation Events | | | Q9–Q14 | Q13–Q16 | |
| Financial Literacy and Business Development Training | | | Q11–Q16 | Q13–Q16 | Q17–Q18 |
| Monitoring and Evaluation (M&E) | Q2–Q4 | Q5–Q8 | Q9–Q12 | Q13–Q16 | Q17–Q20 |
| Policy Advocacy and Stakeholder Engagement | | Q7–Q8 | Q9–Q12 | Q13–Q16 | Q17–Q20 |

> ⚠️ **Note:** Each block represents intensive activity during that period. Ongoing activities continue throughout the project duration.
